1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer and municipality geometry

2.description: get buildings (id and point) inside the municipality using kommunenummer filter

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons reduced to the municipality extent (stormflo200ar_klimaarna)

5.description: count distinct building ids that intersect the storm-flood polygons
